name: Arugula Salad with Orange Couscous & Citrus
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Fresh ginger root -- finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
To make salad:
Measure water into a 2-cup glass measure. Microwave on high for 3 minutes, or until boiling. Stir in couscous, cover with plastic wrap and let stand for 5 minutes. Fluff with fork.
Peel and segment oranges over a large stainless steel bowl to catch excess juice - reserve segments for garnish. After segmenting oranges, squeeze the juice from the core and membranes into the bowl. Add mango, basil, chives, cumin, toasted pine nuts, and couscous; toss to combine. Pack mixture into 6 individual serving dishes (1/2 cup each).
Arrange arugula in a wagon-wheel fashion on six large plates. Unmold couscous in the center of each plate. Garnish with reserved orange sections.
To make Vinaigrette:
Peel orange, grapefruit, lime, and lemon. Cut each into segments over a large stainless steel bowl to catch excess juices. Carefully dice the segments, cutting them without crushing.
Add oil, vinegar, soy sauce, and tabasco to the fruit juices in the bowl - whisk to blend. Add peppercorns, ginger, cilantro, and diced fruit; stir to combine. Makes about 1 1/4 cups. Drizzle over couscous.
